questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Give the input, what would be step V of the input?
Input: Only you can do all thing right.

choices.a: you only right thing all do can
choices.b: only you thing right all can do
choices.c: only thing you right all do can
choices.d: thing only you right all do can

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If step IV of a given input be 'It is last serious warning to you', what would be the input?

choices.a: you last is to serious it warning
choices.b: last you is to warning it serious
choices.c: serious last to it warning is you
choices.d: warning to serious it is you last
